prerequisites: An ActiveCampaign account with access to the Settings > Developer page (each user has their own unique API key).
The account name (your ActiveCampaign account/subdomain), used for the account_username config field.
An API key copied from Settings > Developer, used for the api_key config field.

authMethods.name: API Key (Api-Token header)
authMethods.summary: ActiveCampaign API v3 authenticates with a per-user API key sent in the Api-Token HTTP header. Provide it via the api_key secret field. The key is found on the Settings > Developer page of your account.

setupSteps.title: Get your API URL and API Key
setupSteps.body: Log in to ActiveCampaign, open Settings from the left menu, and select the Developer tab. This page shows your account API URL (in the form https://<your-account>.api-us1.com/api/3) and your API Key. Each user has a unique key, and the Developer tab is always the source of truth for the URL.

setupSteps.title: Set the account name
setupSteps.body: Enter your ActiveCampaign account name in the account_username config field. This is the subdomain portion of your API URL shown on the Developer tab (the <your-account> part of https://<your-account>.api-us1.com).

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Paste the API Key from the Developer tab into the api_key secret field. The connector sends it in the Api-Token request header to authenticate against the ActiveCampaign API v3.
